briefdescription.para: Align size up to 16-byte boundary for flash write alignment.
Compute the flash address of a parameter slot.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_ParamStore *store, uint8_t sector, uint16_t slot, uint16_t expected_crc)
memberdef.name: verify_slot_crc

briefdescription.para: Verify CRC of a stored slot's data.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_ParamStore *store, uint8_t sector, uint16_t slot, SYN_ParamSlotHeader *hdr, void *data)
memberdef.name: read_slot

briefdescription.para: Read a slot header and data from flash.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ParamStore *store, uint32_t flash_base, uint8_t sector_count, uint16_t data_size)
memberdef.name: syn_param_init

detaileddescription.para: Scans flash to find the latest valid slot. Must be called before load or save.

parameterdescription.para: Start address of the flash region for params.
Number of flash sectors to use for wear leveling.
Size of the parameter struct in bytes.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK if at least one valid slot was found, SYN_ERROR if flash is blank (use defaults).

briefdescription.para: Load parameters from the latest valid slot.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer to receive the parameter data (must be data_size bytes).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR if no valid data found.

briefdescription.para: Save parameters to the next slot (wear-leveled).

detaileddescription.para: Writes to the next free slot, rotating across sectors. When a sector fills up, the next sector is erased and writing continues there.

parameterdescription.para: Parameter data to save (must be data_size bytes).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR on flash write failure.

briefdescription.para: Persistent parameter store with wear leveling.
